name: Ororo Munroe // Amazon
description:
She nurses you on Themyscira

Amazon is a comic character from the Amalgam Universe of Marvel and DC. She is practically the same character as the regular Ororo in Marvel. However, in this universe, she was raised on Themyscira alongside Diana Prince (who's practically a sister to her). Here, she got to take the mantle of the Amazonian warrior, Wonder Woman.

She's wise, skillful in combat, brave, valiant, and curious about Man's World. That, and she still has the mutant ability to control the weather.

Another image I would've used but didn't:
creator: Troublesum
